messages.title: Outstanding Shield!
messages.body: You deflected every health crisis like a pro. You clearly understand the value of comprehensive coverage.

messages.title: Strong Coverage!
messages.body: Great effort! You blocked most health shocks. A few coverage gaps remain — a critical illness plan can fill them.

messages.title: Partial Shield
messages.body: Some risks broke through your defences. Consider a critical illness plan to strengthen your protection.

messages.title: Shield Weakened
messages.body: Health risks broke through. This is a reminder — without coverage, one illness can derail your financial goals.

introHowToPlay.text: Mouse or Touch to move paddle· Tap to launch

copy.scoringTagline: A strong portfolio needs a strong shield. Don’t let life’s uncertainties reset your progress.
copy.scoringCtaLine: Why choose between growth and security? To Invest in Dual Benefit Plan, Call your relationship manager now!
copy.relationshipManagerLine: Call your Relationship Manager now to secure your financial journey.
copy.thankYouBody: Thank you for sharing your details. Our Relationship Manager will reach out to you shortly.

contact.disclaimer: THE RESULTS SHOWN IN THIS GAME ARE INDICATIVE AND BASED SOLELY ON THE INFORMATION PROVIDED BY THE PARTICIPANT. THEY ARE INTENDED FOR ENGAGEMENT AND AWARENESS PURPOSES ONLY AND DO NOT CONSTITUTE FINANCIAL ADVICE OR A RECOMMENDATION TO PURCHASE ANY LIFE INSURANCE PRODUCT. PARTICIPANTS SHOULD SEEK INDEPENDENT PROFESSIONAL ADVICE BEFORE MAKING ANY FINANCIAL OR INSURANCE DECISIONS. WHILE DUE CARE HAS BEEN TAKEN IN DESIGNING THE GAME, BAJAJ LIFE INSURANCE LTD. ASSUMES NO LIABILITY FOR ITS OUTCOMES.
contact.tcText: I hereby authorize Bajaj Life Insurance Limited to call me on the contact number made available by me on the website with a specific request to call back. I further declare that, irrespective of my contact number being registered on National Customer Preference Register (NCPR) or on National Do Not Call Registry (NDNC), any call made, SMS or WhatsApp sent in response to my request shall not be construed as an Unsolicited Commercial Communication even though the contact number may be registered on DNC.
